name: Here's My Heart Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup HERSHEY'S Cocoa OR European Style Cocoa
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 13x9x2-inch pan with foil.
2. In a medium bowl, place 1 cup white chips and almond extract. In a second medium bowl, stir together cocoa, melted butter, and vanilla extract until the mixture is smooth; add the remaining 2/3 cup white chips (chips do not need to melt).
3. In a heavy 4-quart saucepan, stir together sugar, marshmallow creme, evaporated milk, and 1/4 cup butter. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to full rolling boil (bubbles cannot be stirred down); continue boiling and stirring for 5 minutes. Remove from heat. Immediately add half of the hot mixture to the bowl with white chips only. Pour the remainder into the cocoa mixture; stir to blend.
4. Beat the white chip mixture until the chips are completely melted; stir in red food color, if desired, and cherries. Spread evenly in the prepared pan.
5. Beat the cocoa mixture until the chips are melted and the mixture thickens slightly. Spread evenly over the top of the white layer. Cover; refrigerate until firm.
6. Remove from the pan; peel off the foil. Cut with heart-shaped cookie cutters or cut into squares. Store in the refrigerator. About 8 dozen squares.
NOTE: For best results, do not double this recipe.
